title: platostoma cochinchinense
intro: Platostoma cochinchinense, also known as Vietnamese basil or Vietnamese mint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Platostoma cochinchinense include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Platostoma cochinchinense is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can also be used as a flavoring agent in cooking.
